issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 3 cards, (2) filtering for Navy type cards excluding Brannew, (3) revealing up to 1 card to hand, (4) trashing the rest. Current DSL only has generic SearchDeck with no filter specification, card limit, or trash action.
Filter kind is 'Any' but should specify Navy type AND exclude Brannew by name. Filter needs both type requirement and exclusion logic.
Missing trash action. After revealing up to 1 card to hand, remaining cards must be trashed. Current DSL has no ForceDiscard/trash action.
